sizing_rule.note: Optimal f values for individual portfolio components must be adjusted proportionally to reflect geometric optimal portfolio weights. Apply when total allocation (Percentage Invested + NIC) reaches constraint threshold S (typically 100%). This is a portfolio-level optimal f reallocation rule.

source_rule_text: Portfolio weights derived from geometric optimal portfolio solution must be reflected back into the optimal f values of individual portfolio components to determine position sizing, accounting for constraints on total allocation.
